column5:
So long story short, I'm starting a side project where I try to watch nationwide releases of each year from the 2010s, however I'm only basing this off of if I would want to watch it now were it in theaters. So I'm skipping some movies that just frankly don't interest me but it's not like they'll have a huge impact on this list. This also, of course, includes limited releases but they have to have at least a 2.5 rating on LB. I don't fucking know why, but I'm trying to make my own ranked list of the decade. Gotta start somewhere, right?

This is based off of wide US release. For example, Daybreakers premiered at TIFF in September 2009, but saw it's wide release on January 8, 2010.
